title: Formatting Outlook Automation Email Notification
excerpt:
Are you able to format the Outlook automation email notification?  For example can I make some of the text bold or underlined? 
Thx

posts.author: Slaterman (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you able to format the Outlook automation email notification? For example can I make some of the text bold or underlined?

Thx

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Adam! Welcome to the monday Community! At this time, email automations (Outlook and Gmail) only have basic text formatting. Users cannot bold, italicize, or underline text in their email templates yet. However, it looks like a feature request was recently submitted to prioritize this on the Product Roadmap. You can upvote it here: Enhanced Text Formatting for Automated Emails.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Slaterman as a midterm workaround I can suggest you try out SuperMail.

It’s a 3rd party native monday.com app that allows you send designed automated emails, also has a lot of other cool benefits, you can track emails include attachments, hyperlinks, mirror columns and even buttons that will reflect back to your board, great for approvals. You can can test it for free.
